overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a dusk walk through Night City's waterfront district. The player character moves along a neon-lit promenade beneath illuminated arches, crosses a street intersection, and continues along the open waterfront with views of futuristic skyscrapers and distant industrial towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront promenade with illuminated archway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the illuminated arch structures, with the water canal visible to the right

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the multi-lane road parallel to the walkway

entered.detail: futuristic curved metal structure with warm yellow linear lights spanning over the walkway
tall glass towers with cyan and blue neon window lighting dominating the skyline
calm waterway running parallel to the walkway with reflections of city lights
large illuminated advertising screen displaying product advertisements
red illuminated sign with white text marking the district entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered waterfront promenade beneath a striking illuminated archway. The player walks forward along the tiled sidewalk with a water canal to the right and neon-lit skyscrapers rising to the left. The arches create a rhythmic pattern of light and shadow overhead while sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic moves through the scene.

events.description: exits the covered archway into the open intersection with full sky visibility
crossing the multi-lane street at the crosswalk while vehicles wait at the intersection
turning right onto the waterfront promenade after crossing the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection and turning right to follow the waterfront path, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: silver futuristic coupe driving through the intersection

entered.detail: red metal structure spanning the road with traffic signals and signage
yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
tall palm trees lining the opposite side of the street

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the covered walkway into an open urban intersection. The camera crosses the street at the crosswalk, passing beneath a red traffic gantry, then turns right onto the waterfront path. Vehicles move through the intersection while the skyline shifts to reveal new angles of the neon-lit towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with city skyline views

events.description: view opens to wide waterfront vista with distant industrial towers and calm water reflections

agents.ego_description: walking along the open waterfront promenade, occasionally glancing toward the water and distant cityscape

notable_agents.action: couple walking ahead along the promenade in the same direction

entered.detail: metal safety barrier separating the walkway from the water drop
tall cylindrical industrial structures with warning lights visible across the water
low orange wall running along the edge of the promenade
large blocky building with the number 06 visible on the facade

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the open waterfront promenade with unobstructed views of the water and distant industrial skyline. The player walks past palm trees and orange barriers while the sky transitions to deep blue hour. The camera captures reflections on the calm water and the imposing industrial towers across the canal.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered, rhythmic promenade into an expansive, open-air waterfront under a deepening twilight sky. It begins beneath a series of illuminated archways, moving along a tiled sidewalk where neon-lit skyscrapers tower to the left and a canal flows to the right. As the camera emerges from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a busy urban intersection, crossing beneath a red traffic gantry before turning right back toward the water. The perspective then shifts to an unobstructed waterfront path, passing palm trees and orange barriers as the lighting transitions into a deep blue hour. Finally, the movement settles into a steady walk along the canal, capturing the reflections of imposing industrial towers and a distant skyline shimmering on the calm water.
